title: Oairse Set of 2 Ceramic Plant Pots 13CM 15CM Brown Ceramic Planter with Drainage Holes and Saucers Decorative Stripe Plant Pots Indoor Modern Flower Pots for Succulent Cactus Orchid House Plants
features: Original Design - These modern plant pots set adopted a superb design, carving stripe patterns on each surface of the planters, which is unique and elegant, perfect for decorating your home, office, garden or for any décor style.

Suitable Size - Comes in 2pcs decorative planter pots with different sizes to meet your demand. Small planter pot diameter:14.5CM, height: 15CM, the large diameter: 12.5CM, height:11.5CM. Perfect to grow most small and medium sized plants, such as succulents, snake plants, orchid, herbs, cactus, aloe, devil's ivy and so on. (NOT INCLUDED PLANTS)

Drainage Holes & Ceramic Tray - These plant pot are made from sturdy ceramic, each ceramic flower pots is equipped with drainage holes and saucer to keep soil drained and ventilated, prevents the flower pot from overwatering, promoting plant living, to help your plants thrive.

Multiple Application - These modern indoor/outdoor planters bring natural green to your home or office decoration, is suitable for garden, yard, patio, living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, windowsill, shelves and office tabletop. It's also a great gift for family, friends and plant lover!

Friendly Customer Support - Each ceramic planter pot is wrapped with thick foam to minimize damage it during transportation. If any potential damage or issues with the plant pot, please feel free to contact us.
